event: Attack contract deployed and attack initiated
entities: Harvest Finance; Curve yPool; USDC; USDT
source_detail: Harvest post-mortem identifies attacker wallet 0xf224ab004461540778a914ea397c589b677e27bb and attack contract 0xc6028a9fa486f52efd2b95b949ac630d287ce0af
market_health_signal: Fresh contract plus same-block funding and execution concentrated manipulation risk

source_detail: Post-mortem says the contract sourced 50000000 USDC and 18308555.417594 USDT from Uniswap
market_health_signal: Large temporary inventory enabled price impact without long-term capital commitment

event: Curve yPool USDT-to-USDC swap changed pool asset values
source_detail: Post-mortem says 17222012.640506 USDT was swapped into USDC inside Curve yPool before Harvest USDC vault deposit
market_health_signal: Depth-adjusted trade size and pool imbalance were the immediate oracle manipulation inputs

event: USDC vault deposit used manipulated share price
source_detail: Attacker deposited 49977468.555526 USDC and received 51456280.788906 fUSDC at 0.97126080216 USDC per share
market_health_signal: Deposit pricing referenced manipulable pool state while arbitrage check stayed below threshold

event: Attack repeated across fUSDC and fUSDT
entities: Harvest fUSDC; Harvest fUSDT; Curve yPool
source_detail: Harvest says 17 USDC-vault attack transactions occurred within 4 minutes and 13 USDT-vault transactions within another 3 minutes
market_health_signal: Compressed transaction burst is a market-health signal for artificial price state extraction

source_detail: Harvest says 13000000 USDC and 11000000 USDT moved from the attack contract to 0x3811765a53c3188c24d412daec3f60faad5f119b
market_health_signal: Outbound transfer reconciles the vault-price manipulation to realized stablecoin extraction

event: Partial funds returned to Harvest deployer
source_detail: Etherscan shows 1761898.396474 USDC and 718914.048541 USDT transferred from the attack contract to Harvest deployer
market_health_signal: Returned funds should be tracked separately from gross extraction and vault drawdown

event: Harvest withdrew shared-pool funds and disabled vulnerable conversions
entities: Harvest Finance; Curve yPool; DAI; USDC; USDT; TUSD; WBTC; renBTC
source_detail: Harvest incident page says remaining shared-pool funds were reverted to vaults pending investigation
market_health_signal: Emergency withdrawal is a containment signal after oracle-dependent vault pricing is compromised

source_detail: Post-mortem says fUSDC share price moved from 0.980007 to 0.834953 and fUSDT from 0.978874 to 0.844812
market_health_signal: Share-price discontinuity distinguishes user balance impact from the attacker outbound transfer
